channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Rubbish dumped overnight, 17th April
item.description:
Black sacs of general household waste were dumped outside 255 queens Road Peckham. It got cleared, however there is still lots of rubbish leftover and it’s blowing all over the surrounding area including Pomeroy street

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 255, Pomeroy Street, New Cross Gate, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Garden gate, loose bits of wood, stones amd plastoc, 17th April
item.description:
This showed up a few weeks ago and has been there since it hasnt come from amyone on this close

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Franklin Close, Lewisham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Loose railing overlooking the river right next to pier URGRNT, 17th April
item.description:
URGENT repair neccesery lots of members of public are nearby by the Uber board boarding westbound upper pier

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): King William Walk, East Greenwich, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Noisy and fast motorbikes in the green spaces/park, 17th April
item.description:
A group of motorbikes (5) gathering in the oark, adults with their children. Even saw a baby on the motorbike (no common sense or safety awareness). Loud and fast with no consideration to rhe others, people's children or pets or the environment. Arrogant and ignorant behaviour.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Magpie Hall Lane, Bromley Common, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Large amount of waste by mixed recycling bin, 17th April
item.description:
Noticed today a large amount of waste beside the shared mixed recycling bin here can council attend and clear before it attracts pests
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Erwood Road, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipping outside XOYO, 17th April
item.description:
Massive amount of litter on the pavement outside XOYO

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Cowper Street, Finsbury, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Every single day again! Can Hackney Council enforce this with a laminated sign WARNING to not dump rubbish next to property, 17th April
item.description:
We are exhausted to report this. Every single day someone dump garbage outside property. Can Hackney Council check the CCTV camera? Is it so difficult do it or perhaps we should buy a camera record this every day and report it to the Metropolitan police?

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Stoke Newington High Street, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned scooter vehicle, 17th April
item.description:
Abandoned possibly stolen

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Linnell Close, Golders Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fruiting tree on public street, 17th April
item.description:
This fruiting plum tree now maily overhangs my front garden and drops fruit not only onto my property but also covering the pavement making a complete mess and making it slippery at certain times of the year. Even with constant sweeping the plums get squashed by passers by. I would like to know if it would be possible to replace the tree with one that doesn’t bear fruit. Many thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Beaconsfield Road, Bickley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Wooden desk dumped next to tree, 17th April
item.description:
Remove it

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wansey Street, Walworth, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: More rubbish left for weeks, 17th April
item.description:
They have a bin but don't use it

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Nadine Street, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Load of food refuse dumped, 17th April
item.description:
Rubbish dumped- including food waste

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Green Street, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dead fox, 17th April
item.description:
Deceased fox

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Sefton Road, Poverest, Greater London

item.title: Big rubbish bags dumbed, 17th April
item.description:
There is full rubbish bags opposite garage entrance has been left by tenant from 149 Victorian grove( opposite) and there is dog poo next to it and pile of messy leaves.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Victorian Grove, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lime Bikes Parked on Overcrowded Parking Bay., 17th April
item.description:
Lime Bikes Parked on Overcrowded Parking Bay. Some biked are on the pavement blocking of Most of the businesses Entrance and Fire Exits. Little Newport Street
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 2, Newport Place, Chinatown, City of Westminster
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 17th April
item.description:
Mattress and bed base dumped on the street outside 35 Worsley bridge road.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Worsley Bridge Road, Perry Vale, Greater London

Mattress and other items

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bullace Row, Camberwell, Greater London

item.title: Left for weeks, 17th April
item.description:
Difficult seeing round vehicle on busy 4 way junction at gipsy road which has seen lots of vehicle accidents

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Normanhurst Avenue, West Heath, Greater London

item.title: Water is running fast from man hole all the way, 17th April
item.description:
Water running fast all the way through the streets..

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Barbauld Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bags of litter dumped by tree again, 17th April
item.description:
On the corner of Fletching Road and Fairfield Grove, about 7 bags of litter dumped by the tree on the pavement. This happens frequently.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Woolwich Road, Greenwich
Report on FixMyStreet
